nasb.text: You shall keep it until the fourteenth day of the same month, then the whole assembly of the congregation of Israel is to kill it at twilight.

esv.text: and you shall keep it until the fourteenth day of this month, when the whole assembly of the congregation of Israel shall kill their lambs at twilight.

cnv.text: 你們要把羊羔留到本月十四日，在黃昏的時候，以色列全體會眾要把羊羔宰殺。

ccb.text: 全体会众要把羊留到本月十四日，在黄昏时分宰杀，
